# GitHub Repository Profile

Use the following values for the GitHub repository sidebar.

## About

Linux-first Vision Pro workspace development workflow with browser-simulated spatial web windows and governed handoff to a remote Mac Builder for native Xcode tasks.

## Website

https://jishengyang-cal.github.io/vision-web-workspace/

- visionos
- spatial-computing
- web-workspace
- mac-builder
- xcodebuild
- remote-development
- typescript
- realitykit
- swiftui
